judge_reasoning: Policy applied correctly (explicitly names the $25k floor and declines), voice matches Dana's style (warm, concise, no exclamation marks, correct sign-off), and the draft is safely staged without sending. The gap is criterion 2: the policy and rubric both specify referring BrightPath to the monthly retainer (6,000 USD/month) as the constructive alternative, but the agent instead offered T&M or a budget bump to the fixed-bid floor, never mentioning the retainer option.
